# Test Fixtures

Audio fixtures are generated programmatically by `tests/conftest.py` using numpy
and scipy. They are synthetic signals — no copyright issues.

## Fixture Files (generated at test time)

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `beat_120bpm_10s.wav` | 10-second synthetic clip, 120 BPM kick drum on each beat |
| `ambient_10s.wav` | 10-second smooth sine wave, no transients, no beat |
| `drums_melody_10s.wav` | 10-second clip with drums on beats 1+3, 4-note melody |

## Ground Truth Annotations

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `drums_melody_10s_ground_truth.json` | Known drum hit and melody note onset timestamps |

## Regenerating Fixtures

```bash
pytest tests/ --fixtures  # fixtures are auto-generated by conftest.py on first run
```

## License

All fixture files are synthetic signals generated by the test suite.
No copyrighted audio material is used.
